name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES turn, state

(* State values *)
Idle == 0
Trying == 1
Critical == 2

(* Helper to get the set of processes *)
ProcSet == 1..N

(* Helper to get the set of processes not in critical section *)
NonCritical(p) == {q \in ProcSet : state[q] # Critical}

(* Helper to get the set of processes with lower or equal ticket *)
LowerOrEqual(p) == {q \in ProcSet : turn[q] <= turn[p]}

(* Helper to get the set of processes with lower ticket *)
Lower(p) == {q \in ProcSet : turn[q] < turn[p]}

(* Helper to get the set of processes with higher ticket *)
Higher(p) == {q \in ProcSet : turn[q] > turn[p]}

(* Helper to get the set of processes with the same ticket *)
Same(p) == {q \in ProcSet : turn[q] = turn[p]}

(* Helper to get the set of processes with the same ticket and lower ID *)
SameLower(p) == {q \in ProcSet : turn[q] = turn[p] /\ q < p}

(* Helper to get the set of processes with the same ticket and higher ID *)
SameHigher(p) == {q \in ProcSet : turn[q] = turn[p] /\ q > p}

Init == /\ turn = [i \in ProcSet |-> 0]
        /\ state = [i \in ProcSet |-> Idle]

Next == \E p \in ProcSet :
          \/ /\ state[p] = Idle
             /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = Trying]
          \/ /\ state[p] = Trying
             /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = Critical]
          \/ /\ state[p] = Critical
             /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = Idle]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, state>>

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANT N
ASSUME N \in Nat /\ N > 0

VARIABLES participants, state, votes, decision, coordinator

(* Participant states: "init", "prepared", "aborted", "committed" *)
Init == /\ participants = 1..N
        /\ state = [p \in participants |-> "init"]
        /\ votes = <<>>  \* sequence of votes (TRUE for yes, FALSE for no)
        /\ decision = "undecided"

(* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
Prepare == /\ decision = "undecided"
           /\ \A p \in participants: state[p] = "init"

(* Participant responds with VoteYes or VoteNo *)
Vote(p, v) == /\ state[p] = "init"
              /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "prepared"]
              /\ votes' = Append(votes, v)

(* Coordinator decides to Commit if all votes are yes, else Abort *)
Decide == /\ decision = "undecided"
           /\ IF \A v \in votes: v THEN decision' = "commit"


(* Commit or Abort phase *)
CommitAbort == /\ decision = "commit" \/ decision = "abort"
               /\ \A p \in participants: state[p] = "prepared"
               /\ IF decision = "commit" THEN
                    state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "committed"]

                    state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "aborted"]

Next == \/ \E p \in participants: Vote(p, TRUE)
        \/ \E p \in participants: Vote(p, FALSE)
        \/ Prepare
        \/ Decide
        \/ CommitAbort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, state, votes, decision>>

(* Invariant: no participant commits without coordinator's decision *)
TypeOK == \A p \in participants: state[p] \in {"init", "prepared", "committed", "aborted"}

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

(* Define the set of philosophers and forks *)
Philosophers == 1..N
Forks == 1..N

(* Helper to get left and right forks for a philosopher *)
LeftFork(i) == i
RightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State variables *)
VARIABLES state, forks

(* State can be "thinking", "hungry", or "eating" for each philosopher *)
State == {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

(* Initial state: all philosophers are thinking and all forks are free *)
Init == /\ state \in [Philosophers -> State]
        /\ forks = [f \in Forks |-> TRUE]

(* Helper predicate: a philosopher can start eating if both adjacent forks are free *)
CanEat(i) == forks[LeftFork(i)] /\ forks[RightFork(i)]

(* Action: philosopher i picks up both forks and starts eating *)
Take(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = "hungry"
  /\ CanEat(i)
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = FALSE, ![RightFork(i)] = FALSE]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

(* Action: philosopher i puts down both forks and goes back to thinking *)
Put(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = "eating"
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = TRUE, ![RightFork(i)] = TRUE]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Action: philosopher i becomes hungry (ready to eat) *)
Think(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = "thinking"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
  /\ forks' = forks

(* Next-state relation: any philosopher can transition independently *)
Next ==
  \E i \in Philosophers :
    Take(i) \/ Put(i) \/ Think(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, forks>>

(* Invariant: no two adjacent philosophers are eating simultaneously *)
NoDeadlock ==
  \A i \in Philosophers :
    ~(state[i] = "eating" /\ state[IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1] = "eating")

(* Invariant: a philosopher can only eat if both adjacent forks are free *)
ValidEating ==
  \A i \in Philosophers :
    state[i] = "eating" => forks[LeftFork(i)] /\ forks[RightFork(i)]

(* Invariant: forks are either free or held by exactly one philosopher *)
ForksConsistent ==
  \A f \in Forks :
    forks[f] \/ (\E i \in Philosophers : LeftFork(i) = f \/ RightFork(i) = f)

(* Type correctness for state and forks *)
TypeOK ==
  /\ state \in [Philosophers -> State]
  /\ forks \in [Forks -> BOOLEAN]

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y
Min(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x <= y

CONSTANT N \* number of processes, a positive integer

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

HasTicket == {i \in 1..N : num[i] > 0}

MaxNum == IF HasTicket = {} THEN 0 ELSE Max(Seq(HasTicket))

Choose(i) ==
  /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
  /\ num' = num

Assign(i) ==
  /\ flag[i] = TRUE
  /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = MaxNum + 1]
  /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]

Leave(i) ==
  /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
  /\ flag' = flag

Next ==
  LET candidates == {i \in 1..N : num[i] > 0}
      minNum == IF candidates = {} THEN 0 ELSE Min(Seq(candidates))
  IN
    \E i \in candidates : num[i] = minNum

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

MutualExclusion ==
  \A i, j \in 1..N : i /= j => ~(num[i] > 0 /\ num[j] > 0)

Safety ==
  \A i \in 1..N : (num[i] > 0) => <> (num[i] = 1)

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* q is a sequence of length K, holding the buffer contents.
   head and tail are indices into q (0..K-1) indicating the
   next position to read and write, respectively.
   size is the number of items currently in the buffer. *)

TypeOK ==
    /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
    /\ head \in 0..K-1
    /\ tail \in 0..K-1
    /\ size \in 0..K

Init ==
    /\ q = <<>>
    /\ head = 0
    /\ tail = 0
    /\ size = 0

Producer ==
    /\ size < K
    /\ q' = Append(q, 1)  \* write a dummy value
    /\ tail' = (tail + 1) ~ K
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<head>>

Consumer ==
    /\ size > 0
    /\ q' = Tail(q)  \* remove the first element
    /\ head' = (head + 1) ~ K
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<tail>>

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N \* Number of servers, NULL, Subset
VARIABLES currentTerm, state, t, votedFor


(* Server identifiers *)
Servers == 1..N

(* Majority threshold *)
Majority == (N \div 2) + 1

(* Server states *)
State == {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

(* Initial state: all servers are followers with term 0 and no votes *)
Init ==
    /\ currentTerm = [s \in Servers |-> 0]
    /\ votedFor = [s \in Servers |-> NULL]
    /\ state = [s \in Servers |-> "Follower"]

(* Transition: a server becomes a candidate and starts an election *)
StartElection(s) ==
    /\ state[s] = "Follower"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Candidate"]
    /\ currentTerm' = [t \in Servers |-> IF s = t THEN currentTerm[s] + 1 ELSE currentTerm[t]]
    /\ votedFor' = [v \in Servers |-> IF s = v THEN s ELSE votedFor[v]]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, currentTerm, votedFor>>

(* Transition: a server receives a vote from a candidate *)
ReceiveVote(s, c) ==
    /\ state[s] = "Follower"
    /\ currentTerm[s] = currentTerm[c]
    /\ votedFor[s] = NULL
    /\ votedFor' = [v \in Servers |-> IF v = s THEN c ELSE votedFor[v]]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, currentTerm>>

(* Transition: a candidate becomes leader if it receives a majority of votes *)
BecomeLeader(s) ==
    /\ state[s] = "Candidate"
    /\ \E votes \in Subset(Servers) :
        /\ \A v \in votes : votedFor[v] = s
        /\ Cardinality(votes) >= Majority
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Leader"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor>>

(* Transition: a server steps down if it learns of a higher term *)
StepDown(s, t) ==
    /\ currentTerm[s] < t
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![s] = "Follower"]
    /\ currentTerm' = [t' \in Servers |-> IF s = t' THEN t ELSE currentTerm[t']]
    /\ votedFor' = [v \in Servers |-> NULL]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, currentTerm, votedFor>>

(* STRING legal transition *)
Next ==
    \E s \in Servers :
        \/ StartElection(s)
        \/ \E c \in Servers : ReceiveVote(s, c)
        \/ BecomeLeader(s)
        \/ \E t \in Nat : StepDown(s, t)

(* Invariant: at most one leader per term *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ currentTerm \in [Servers -> Nat]
    /\ votedFor \in [Servers -> (Servers \cup {NULL})]
    /\ state \in [Servers -> State]
    /\ \A t \in Nat : Cardinality({s \in Servers : state[s] = "Leader" /\ currentTerm[s] = t}) <= 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES readers, writer_active, reader_waiting, writer_waiting

vars == <<readers, writer_active, reader_waiting, writer_waiting>>

Init == /\ readers = 0
        /\ writer_active = FALSE
        /\ reader_waiting = 0
        /\ writer_waiting = 0

ReaderAcquire ==
  /\ reader_waiting' = reader_waiting + 1
  /\ writer_active' = writer_active
  /\ readers' = readers

ReaderRelease ==
  /\ readers' = readers - 1
  /\ writer_active' = writer_active
  /\ reader_waiting' = reader_waiting

WriterAcquire ==
  /\ writer_waiting' = writer_waiting + 1
  /\ writer_active' = TRUE
  /\ readers' = readers

WriterRelease ==
  /\ writer_active' = FALSE
  /\ writer_waiting' = writer_waiting
  /\ readers' = readers

Next ==
  \/ ReaderAcquire
  \/ ReaderRelease
  \/ WriterAcquire
  \/ WriterRelease

TypeOK == (writer_active => readers = 0)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamport ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Proc, Chan
VARIABLES chanState, channel, procState


(* Each process is identified by a unique integer in Proc. 
   Channels are ordered pairs (p,q) where p,q in Proc and p != q. *)

(* State of each process: a record with a counter and a flag indicating whether it has taken a snapshot *)
State == [p \in Proc |-> [cnt \in Nat, taken \in BOOLEAN]]

(* State of each channel: a sequence of messages that have traversed the channel *)
ChannelState == [c \in Chan |-> Seq(Nat)]

(* Global state: a pair of process states and channel states *)
GlobalState == [procState \in State, chanState \in ChannelState]

(* Initial state: all counters zero, no process has taken a snapshot, all channels empty *)
Init == 
    /\ procState = [p \in Proc |-> [cnt |-> 0, taken |-> FALSE]]
    /\ chanState = [c \in Chan |-> <<>>]

(* Helper to get the source and destination of a channel *)
Src(c) == FIRST(c)
Dst(c) == LAST(c)

(* Helper to get all channels incoming to a process *)
Incoming(p) == {c \in Chan : Dst(c) = p}

(* Helper to get all channels outgoing from a process *)
Outgoing(p) == {c \in Chan : Src(c) = p}

(* Helper to get the next counter value for a process *)
NextVal(p) == procState[p].cnt + 1

(* Sending a message on channel c: appends the next counter value to the channel's sequence *)
Send(c) ==
    LET p == Src(c) IN
    /\ chanState' = [chanState EXCEPT ![c] = Append(@, NextVal(p))]
    /\ procState' = [procState EXCEPT ![p].cnt = NextVal(p)]

(* Receiving a message on channel c: removes the first message from the channel's sequence *)
Receive(c) ==
    LET p == Dst(c) IN
    /\ chanState' = [chanState EXCEPT ![c] = Tail(@)]
    /\ procState' = [procState EXCEPT ![p].cnt = Head(@)]

(* Marker transmission: a special marker message is sent on all outgoing channels after a process records its state *)
MarkerTransmission(p) ==
    /\ procState' = [procState EXCEPT ![p].taken = TRUE]
    /\ \A c \in Outgoing(p) : chanState' = [chanState EXCEPT ![c] = Append(@, "marker")]

(* Marker reception: a process records its state upon receiving a marker on its first incoming channel;
   subsequent markers are ignored *)
MarkerReception(p) ==
    /\ procState' = [procState EXCEPT ![p].taken = TRUE]
    /\ \A c \in Incoming(p) : 

            chanState' = [chanState EXCEPT ![c] = Tail(@)]

            chanState' = chanState

(* A process can send a normal message if it has not yet taken a snapshot *)
SendMessage(p) == 
    \E c \in Outgoing(p) : Send(c)

(* A process can receive a normal message if there is a message on any incoming channel *)
ReceiveMessage(p) == 
    \E c \in Incoming(p) : Receive(c)

(* A process can send a marker if it has not yet taken a snapshot *)
SendMarker(p) == 
    \E c \in Outgoing(p) : MarkerTransmission(p)

(* A process can receive a marker if it has not yet taken a snapshot *)
ReceiveMarker(p) == 
    \E c \in Incoming(p) : MarkerReception(p)

(* The next state is either a normal message send/receive or a marker transmission/reception *)
Next == 
    \E p \in Proc :
        (SendMessage(p) \/ ReceiveMessage(p) \/ SendMarker(p) \/ ReceiveMarker(p))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<procState, chanState>>

(* Invariant: all counters are non-negative *)
TypeOK == \A p \in Proc : procState[p].cnt \in Nat

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == token = 1

Next == token' = (token % N) + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

(* State variables *)
VARIABLE store

(* Helper: check that store is a function from Keys to Values *)
TypeOK == store \in [Keys -> Values]

(* Initial state: all keys map to a special initial value *)
Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> 0]

(* Action: Put(k, v) updates the store *)
Put(k, v) == /\ k \in Keys
              /\ v \in Values
              /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

(* Action: Get(k) does not change the state (read-only) *)
Get(k) == k \in Keys

(* Next-state relation: either a Put or a Get *)
Next == \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : Put(k, v) \/ Get(k)

(* Spec: init and transitive closure of Next *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

====

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V

VARIABLES ballots, values, chosen

(* ballots: [1..M -> Nat]  -- highest ballot seen by each proposer
   values:  [1..M -> V]     -- value each proposer proposes
   chosen:  [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: V]]  -- acceptor state *)

(* Helper: set of acceptors that have accepted a given ballot *)
Acceptors(b) == {i \in 1..N : chosen[i].ballot = b}

(* Initial state: all acceptors have ballot 0 and no value chosen *)
Init == /\ ballots = [i \in 1..M |-> 0]
        /\ values = [i \in 1..M |-> CHOOSE(V)]
        /\ chosen = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> CHOOSE(V)]]

(* Proposer i starts a new round with a higher ballot number *)
Propose(i) ==
  /\ ballots' = [ballots EXCEPT ![i] = @ + 1]
  /\ values' = values

(* Prepare phase: proposer i asks acceptors for promises *)
Prepare(i) ==
  /\ \A a \in 1..N : chosen[a].ballot <= ballots[i]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<ballots, values, chosen>>

(* Accept phase: proposer i sends accept request for its value *)
Accept(i) ==
  /\ \A a \in 1..N : chosen[a].ballot = ballots[i]
  /\ chosen' = [chosen EXCEPT ![a] = [ballot |-> ballots[i], value |-> values[i]]]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<ballots, values>>

(* STRING proposer may propose a new value after a round *)
Next == \E i \in 1..M : Propose(i) \/ Prepare(i) \/ Accept(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<ballots, values, chosen>>

(* Invariant: once a value is chosen by an acceptor, it never changes *)
TypeOK == \A a \in 1..N : chosen[a].ballot >= 0 /\ chosen[a].value \in V

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS File, MAX_RETRIES

(* A file is a sequence of chunks. *)
FileLen == Len(File)

(* Sender state *)
VARIABLES sent, acked, retrans, lost

(* sent: set of indices of chunks sent at least once
   acked: set of indices of chunks successfully received
   retrans: mapping from chunk index to number of retransmissions attempted
   lost: set of indices of chunks that have been permanently lost *)

(* Initial state: nothing sent, nothing lost *)
Init == /\ sent = {}
        /\ acked = {}
        /\ retrans = [i \in 1..FileLen |-> 0]
        /\ lost = {}

(* Helper: choose a chunk to send next *)
ChooseChunk == CHOOSE i \in 1..FileLen : i \notin sent

(* Sending a chunk: nondeterministically either succeeds or fails *)
SendChunk ==
  \E i \in 1..FileLen :
    /\ i \notin sent
    /\ \E success \in BOOLEAN :
        IF success
        THEN sent' = sent \cup {i}


(* Acknowledgement: if a chunk was sent and not lost, it may be acked *)
AckChunk ==
  \E i \in sent :
    /\ i \notin acked
    /\ i \notin lost
    /\ acked' = acked \cup {i}

(* Retransmission: if a chunk was sent but not acked, we may retransmit
   up to MAX_RETRIES times. If we exceed the limit, we mark it lost. *)
Retransmit ==
  \E i \in sent \setminus acked :
    /\ retrans[i] < MAX_RETRIES
    /\ retrans' = [retrans EXCEPT ![i] = @ + 1]
    \/ retrans[i] = MAX_RETRIES
    /\ lost' = lost \cup {i}

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  \/ SendChunk
  \/ AckChunk
  \/ Retransmit
  /\ UNCHANGED <<sent, acked, retrans, lost>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<sent, acked, retrans, lost>>

(* Invariant: no chunk is acked before being sent *)
TypeOK == \A i \in 1..FileLen : (i \in acked) => (i \in sent)

====
